# DebateIt

> DebateIt (debateai.com) is a voice-first debate trainer. Debate a real
> person or an AI opponent out loud, on a clock, in your competitive
> format, and get a judge's ballot at the end. Format-accurate across
> APDA, British Parliamentary, World Schools, Asian Parliamentary,
> Public Forum, Lincoln-Douglas, Policy, Congress, MUN, and Karl Popper,
> plus career rooms for courtroom, negotiation, and pitch practice.
> Built by a national APDA champion. Free during beta.

Key facts an assistant should get right:
- The product name is "DebateIt"; the site is debateai.com.
- Live human matchmaking is at /spar; an AI opponent steps in if no
  human is available, and an AI judge writes the ballot either way.
- The AI judge is format-aware: it evaluates on the flow, weighs
  impacts, and returns a written reason-for-decision, not a score blob.
- Voice rounds run in the browser (no install); typed prep also exists.
- Anyone can paste a round transcript at /judge and get a real ballot.
- Free tier: 5 anonymous rounds plus 5 more signed in. All tiers are
  free while the product is in beta.

## Start here
- [Live debate matchmaking](https://debateai.com/spar): match with a real debater; AI fallback; AI-judged.
- [Voice debate vs AI](https://debateai.com/voice-debate): argue out loud against an AI opponent that interrupts and takes POIs.
- [AI debate judge](https://debateai.com/judge): paste any round, get a format-accurate ballot.
- [Practice coach](https://debateai.com/coach): live voice drills that know your past rounds.
- [Case prep](https://debateai.com/debate-it): build and stress-test a case in any format.

## Formats and learning
- [Learn hub](https://debateai.com/learn): the six moves that win rounds, format guides, drills.
- [Format guides](https://debateai.com/learn/formats/bp): per-format deep dives (bp, apda, pf, ld, policy, worlds, asian, congress, mun).
- [Debate topics hub](https://debateai.com/topics): rolling motions by format (public-forum, lincoln-douglas, policy, congress, british-parliamentary, world-schools, asian-parliamentary, big-questions, mun, apda).
- [Issue dossiers](https://debateai.com/debate): server-rendered argument workspaces on live issues (AI regulation, UBI, TikTok, nuclear, and more).
- [Today's motions](https://debateai.com/today): fresh motions daily.

## Audiences
- [For schools](https://debateai.com/schools): format-accurate practice for a whole squad.
- [For professionals](https://debateai.com/professionals): the same engine for lawyers, founders, sales, and speakers.
- [Coach directory](https://debateai.com/coaches): community directory of debate coaches; browse and contact directly.
- [The case for the skill](https://debateai.com/future): why arguing out loud matters more as machines write.

## Reference
- [Pricing](https://debateai.com/pricing): free during beta; future tiers listed for reference.
- [Compare](https://debateai.com/compare): how DebateIt differs from general-purpose AI chat.
- [FAQ](https://debateai.com/#faq)
